env.SUPABASE_URL: required — your Supabase project URL, e.g. https://xxx.supabase.co
env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: required — service_role secret key (Dashboard → Settings → API)
env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: required — same as SUPABASE_URL but exposed to the browser
env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: required — same as SUPABASE_ANON_KEY but exposed to the browser
env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: required — Anthropic Claude API key for AI classification
env.JWT_SECRET: required — random secret string for signing auth tokens
env.DATABASE_URL: required — PostgreSQL connection string (pooled mode for Vercel)
env.DIRECT_URL: required — PostgreSQL connection string (direct mode for Prisma migrations)
